name: Scenes RPG
description:
》 SFW // NSFW 《

Here you can just simply create a story, either it can be f*cked up or just make something whatever you like. It doesn't matter what you wanna create, anything is possible just like the other RPGs here.

Your own creation doesn't need a law now, does it? Depends on you. Yeah, just write whatever that comes in your beautiful mind and this bot will follow your lead.

If it didn't go as planned, try this method ↓

(Example what to type if the bot didn't meet your expectations): After typing a scene you came up with, add this right below your texts — Play as (put the desired character's name here), 3rd/1st PPOV.

(Simply pick if preferred 3rd person or 1st person or both.)

Or if you have your own method that works perfectly for you, use that.

Contact me in Discord: 3xxus.

If you simply wanna be friends, bored or have questions or complaints, there you can contact me.

It's been almost a year now since I've created a bot, lmfao. I've created this bot for myself but since I feel a little generous, I've decided to public it, not like it's a big of a deal, right?
creator: 3xxus
